description_long: This is a daybed-style bed with a solid rectangular wooden frame, featuring three large storage drawers integrated into the base. The back and sides of the frame are paneled, providing a sturdy enclosure and a sofa-like appearance. The bed is topped with a thick mattress and is adorned with multiple pillows of varying sizes, adding comfort and a casual, inviting look. The front face is defined by the three pull-out drawers, each with a small round knob for easy access. The side and back panels have a subtle vertical groove design, enhancing the visual texture of the frame. The overall finish is smooth and monochromatic, giving the bed a clean, modern aesthetic suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces like lobbies or lounges.
description: A modern daybed with a paneled wooden frame, three storage drawers, and multiple pillows on a thick mattress. The design is clean, sturdy, and functional, with a smooth monochrome finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing three storage drawers with knobs, the mattress, and several pillows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the paneled side frame and the depth of the mattress and pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the full paneled back and the tops of the pillows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the matching paneled side and the arrangement of bedding.
